no: Olvyn Spells by Olvyn Churu. 49 active components. Most do NOT require EEex (only 6 of 49 do). Adds 150+ new spells including spell revisions and new mechanics. Only cn:980/990 (ranger/paladin progression) — these don't touch spell content, only class tables.

conflicts.reason: MiH spell additions overlap with Olvyn's spell modification components. Does NOT apply to cn:980/990 (ranger/paladin progression). Install MiH after Olvyn.
conflicts.theirComps: #1 Arcane Spellpack #2 Divine Spellpack #13 Spell Improvements

conflicts.reason: Olvyn has 7+ components with FORBID_COMPONENT spell_rev cn:0 (cn:11051, 14021, 15071, 17261, 21111, 23011, 25011). These auto-block when SR is installed. cn:980/990 (ranger/paladin progression, the only Olvyn components ) do NOT forbid SR and coexist safely.
conflicts.source: MESpells.tp2 lines 2405/2637/2664/2755/2784/2850/3659: FORBID_COMPONENT spell_rev; cn:980/990 have no SR FORBID, 2026-04

conflicts.reason: Mod-level conflict from install guide. Olvyn's spell components cover similar ground to TnT's spell-related tweaks (spider form, true sight, non-detection, grease). Does NOT apply to cn:980/990 (ranger/paladin progression, the only Olvyn components ). Neither detects the other.
conflicts.theirComps: #42 Spider form #46 True Sight #49 Non-Detection #55 Non-hostile Grease
conflicts.source: Mod-level note from II install guide; cn:980/990 only modify class progression 2DAs, 2026-04

conflicts.reason: Olvyn cn:980 FORBID_COMPONENT METweaks cn:900 (same ranger/paladin progression). If METweaks cn:900 installed first, Olvyn cn:980 will not install. Choose one.
conflicts.theirComps: #900 Ranger/Paladin caster level #1000 Monk Deflect Missiles #1600 Wizard Slayer MR

new: Summons insect swarm to harass enemies.
Caster becomes incorporeal, immune to physical.
Chain of lightning arcing between enemies.
Devastating cold from the River Styx.
Touch withers target for massive damage.
Wall of prismatic energy with random effects.
Explosion of sunlight devastating to undead.
Traps target's soul. Save vs death or die.
Beam of light deals 1d8/2 levels to undead.
Creates a spiritual warrior to fight.
Reveals HP of all creatures in range.
Deity's word slays/banishes enemies by HD.
Summons insect swarm to harass enemies.
Caster becomes incorporeal, immune to physical.
Chain of lightning arcing between enemies.
Devastating cold from the River Styx.
Touch withers target for massive damage.
Wall of prismatic energy with random effects.
Explosion of sunlight devastating to undead.
Traps target's soul. Save vs death or die.
Beam of light deals 1d8/2 levels to undead.
Creates a spiritual warrior to fight.
Reveals HP of all creatures in range.
View magical effects on creatures and items.

sum: Adds over 150 new spells including spells for flying and moving through walls. Many spells require EEex.

co.n: Change duration of Bless and Curse to 1 turn
co.tp2n: A: Change duration of Bless and Curse to 1 turn

co.n: Change casting time of Bless and Curse to 1
co.tp2n: B: Change casting time of Bless and Curse to 1

co.n: A and B (Bless/Curse)
co.tp2n: A and B
co.no: Both duration and casting time tweaks for Bless/Curse

co.n: Make it so that Command takes control of the target for 1 round instead of putting them to sleep
co.tp2n: Make it so that Command takes control of the target for 1 round instead of putting them to sleep

co.n: Original BG1-style Entangle
co.tp2n: A: Original BG1-style Entangle

co.n: Remove the saving throw bonus from Entangle
co.tp2n: B: Remove the saving throw bonus from Entangle

co.n: A and B (Entangle)
co.tp2n: A and B
co.no: BG1-style Entangle and no save bonus

co.n: Improve Magical Stone
co.tp2n: Improve Magical Stone

co.n: Turn Know Alignment into Identify Creature, which reveals info about the target (e.g. HP, stats, resistances)
co.tp2n: Turn Know Alignment into Identify Creature, which reveals info about the target (e.g. HP, stats, resistances)
co.no: Replaces Know Alignment with Identify Creature. Requires EEex

co.n: Increase the duration of Negative Plane Protection to 8 hours
co.tp2n: Increase the duration of Negative Plane Protection to 8 hours

co.n: Improve Cloak of Fear
co.tp2n: Improve Cloak of Fear

co.n: 3E-like Flame Strike and Fire Storm
co.tp2n: 3E-like Flame Strike and Fire Storm
co.no: Replaces Flame Strike and Fire Storm with 3E versions

co.n: Make it so Champion's Strength sets the target's Strength to 25
co.tp2n: Make it so Champion's Strength sets the target's Strength to 25 (but it still prevents the caster from casting any more spells for the duration)

co.n: Make it so Nature's Beauty charms enemies rather than blinding or killing them
co.tp2n: Make it so Nature's Beauty charms enemies rather than blinding or killing them

co.n: Original BG1-style Monster Summoning and Animal Summoning spells
co.tp2n: Original BG1-style Monster Summoning and Animal Summoning spells

co.n: Restore original Animate Dead for both priests and wizards
co.tp2n: Restore original Animate Dead for both priests and wizards
co.no: BG1-style Animate Dead for all casters
co.scn: Restore original BG1 Animate Dead (one skeleton per level, which ignore the summoning limit)

co.n: Restore original Animate Dead for only wizards
co.tp2n: Restore original Animate Dead for only wizards
co.no: BG1-style Animate Dead for wizards only
co.scn: Restore original BG1 Animate Dead (one skeleton per level, which ignore the summoning limit)

co.n: Weaken devas but allow more than one to be summoned at once
co.tp2n: Weaken devas but allow more than one to be summoned at once

co.n: Turn Infravision into True Strike, which grants a large THAC0 bonus for a short duration
co.tp2n: Turn Infravision into True Strike, which grants a large THAC0 bonus for a short duration

co.n: Revise Sleep (no Hit Dice limit, but lasts shorter and creatures will wake up when damaged)
co.tp2n: Revise Sleep (no Hit Dice limit, but lasts shorter and creatures will wake up when damaged)

co.n: Revise Power Word, Sleep (no HP limit, but lasts shorter and the creature will wake up when damaged)
co.tp2n: Revise Power Word, Sleep (no HP limit, but lasts shorter and the creature will wake up when damaged)

co.n: Improve Shocking Grasp, Chill Touch and Ghoul Touch
co.tp2n: Improve Shocking Grasp, Chill Touch and Ghoul Touch

co.n: Improve Larloch's Minor Drain and Vampiric Touch
co.tp2n: Improve Larloch's Minor Drain and Vampiric Touch

co.n: Allow familiars to deliver the wizard's touch spells
co.tp2n: Allow familiars to deliver the wizard's touch spells
co.no: Familiar touch spell delivery. Requires EEex

co.n: Improve low-level spells that detect illusions
co.tp2n: Improve low-level spells that detect illusions

co.n: Improve spells that merely weaken enemies rather than disable them (e.g. Deafness, Ray of Enfeeblement, Contagion)
co.tp2n: Improve spells that merely weaken enemies rather than disable them (e.g. Deafness, Ray of Enfeeblement, Contagion)

co.n: Have Skull Trap cap at 10d6 damage
co.tp2n: Have Skull Trap cap at 10d6 damage

co.n: BG2-style improved Ice Storm: 2d10 damage per round for 4 rounds
co.tp2n: BG2-style improved Ice Storm: 2d10 damage per round for 4 rounds

co.n: IWD-style improved Ice Storm: 6d10 damage all at once
co.tp2n: IWD-style improved Ice Storm: 6d10 damage all at once

co.n: Prevent Stoneskin from making characters grey (should be installed after AI mods like SCS)
co.tp2n: Prevent Stoneskin from making characters grey (should be installed after AI mods like SCS)

co.n: Restore original BG1 Otiluke's Resilient Sphere (no saving throw)
co.tp2n: Restore original BG1 Otiluke's Resilient Sphere (no saving throw)

co.n: Restore original BG1 Cone of Cold
co.tp2n: Restore original BG1 Cone of Cold (the cone is larger the farther away the target is; the spell's maximum range increases based on caster level)
co.no: BG1-style Cone of Cold with scaling range

co.n: Make it so the spell Oracle lets you foresee what spells enemies are going to cast
co.tp2n: Make it so the spell Oracle lets you foresee what spells enemies are going to cast (like Spellcraft in 3rd-edition games)

co.n: Make it so Mislead's invisibility becomes partial invisibility when you attack or cast a spell
co.tp2n: Make it so Mislead's invisibility becomes partial invisibility when you attack or cast a spell, just like Improved Invisibility (regardless of whether the image is still alive)

co.n: Make it so Protection from Magical Weapons only lasts 3 rounds but Absolute Immunity lasts 5 rounds
co.tp2n: Make it so Protection from Magical Weapons only lasts 3 rounds but Absolute Immunity lasts 5 rounds

co.n: Improve Chain Lightning
co.tp2n: Improve Chain Lightning

co.n: Improve Delayed Blast Fireball (1d6 per level, up to 20d6)
co.tp2n: Improve Delayed Blast Fireball (1d6 per level, up to 20d6)
co.no: Delayed Blast Fireball damage scaling improvement

co.n: Make Meteor Swarm bombard the area randomly with small meteors rather than a single area of effect
co.tp2n: Make Meteor Swarm bombard the area randomly with small meteors rather than a single area of effect

co.n: Improve Energy Drain
co.tp2n: Improve Energy Drain

co.n: Revise Comet and Dragon's Breath
co.tp2n: Revise Comet and Dragon's Breath

co.n: Let Contingency and Chain Contingency be cast as a free action
co.tp2n: Let Contingency and Chain Contingency be cast as a free action

co.n: Let Farsight be cast as a free action
co.tp2n: Let Farsight be cast as a free action

co.n: Let Clairvoyance be cast indoors
co.tp2n: Let Clairvoyance be cast indoors

co.n: Let Rangers and Paladins gain spells quicker and up to 6th-level spells
co.tp2n: Let Rangers and Paladins gain spells quicker and up to 6th-level spells

co.n: Let Rangers and Paladins cast spells at their full caster level
co.tp2n: Let Rangers and Paladins cast spells at their full caster level

co.n: Add all the new spells to the game, including the really powerful spells
co.tp2n: Add all the new spells to the game, including the really powerful spells
co.no: Adds 150+ new spells including powerful ones. Uses ~49 SPELL.IDS slots (32 wizard, 17 priest). Heavy on wizard L7 (6), L8 (7). Choose one: this or cn:1001 (without powerful spells).

co.n: Add all the new spells to the game, excluding the really powerful spells
co.tp2n: Add all the new spells to the game, excluding the really powerful spells
co.no: Adds new spells excluding the most powerful ones. Uses ~40 SPELL.IDS slots. Safer for IDS slot budget. Choose one: this or cn:1000 (with powerful spells).

co.n: Add the Detect Magic spell, which lets you view the magical effects on any creature by hovering the cursor over them and pressing Left Shift
co.tp2n: Add the Detect Magic spell, which lets you view the magical effects on any creature by hovering the cursor over them and pressing Left Shift (this component removes the ability to do this unless a party member has Detect Magic active)
co.no: Adds Detect Magic spell — view magical effects on creatures. Uses 1 wizard L1 IDS slot.

co.n: Add 3E-like Metamagic abilities to the game
co.tp2n: Add 3E-like Metamagic abilities to the game
co.no: Adds metamagic feats (Empower, Maximize, Quicken, etc.). Requires EEex
